auth.heroTitle: Sign in to your beekeeping workspace without losing the thread of your session.
auth.heroDescription: The frontend talks to the Laravel API through Sanctum. This flow stays focused: sign up, sign in, restore session, and sign out.
auth.layoutHint: React frontend connected to the local API
auth.loginDescription: Get back into BeeKeeper and restore your working session.
auth.registerDescription: Open a BeeKeeper session and receive your access token right away.
auth.name: Name

session.title: The frontend session is active and the Sanctum token is flowing correctly.
session.description: This page stays intentionally minimal so we can validate authentication before wiring the business screens.
session.note: Once authentication looks good, we can plug ruchers and ruches pages onto the same foundation.

notFound.title: This page does not exist
notFound.description: The requested route is not mapped to any screen currently wired into the frontend.

validation.passwordMin: Password must contain at least 8 characters.
